---
title: "Sentences"
---
::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::


<span class="blue-badge">Slides: Sentences ↗</span>

Readings: 

<span class = "reading-badge">SGN Ch. 7: *Structure and prediction*</span>
<span class = "exam-badge">Kim & Osterhout (2005)</span>

<span class = "reading-badge">SGN Ch. 8: *Composing sentences*</span>
<span class = "exam-badge">Bemis & Pylkkanen (2011))</span>

<span class = "reading-badge">SGN Ch. 9: *Building dependencies*</span>
<span class = "exam-badge">Matchin, Sprouse, & Hickok (2014))</span>
